heading: Alerts
body:
To trigger alerts based on [alert conditions](alert-conditions)
and to help ensure cluster performance,
[configure your alert settings](alerts). You can
configure alerts based on specific conditions for your
databases, users, accounts, and more. When you resolve alerts, you
should fix the immediate problem, implement a long-term solution, and
monitor your progress.

Before you get started with alerts, review the [Alert Basics](alert-basics).
